title: Default Key Setup
description: Customize the default key of key binding
body:
This mod allows players to set default keys for their key bindings. It can be used in Modpacks to provide a more reasonable default key setup. Compatible with the enhanced combination keys supported by [Key Binding Patch](https://modrinth.com/mod/key-binding-patch).

You may need to manually set `force_key_reset` option in config to `true` if you are using it along with other default settings mod such as [Default Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/default-options) to ensure key bindings will be reset to their new defaults on next game launch.

![Demo screenshot](https://s21.ax1x.com/2024/11/27/pA40v0U.png)
